zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary de Montagu於1313年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu38歲，母親Elizabeth De Montfort41歲。她於1327年5月10日與Sir Richard Cogan在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年6月26日享年46歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary de Montagu于1313年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu38岁，母亲Elizabeth De Montfort41岁。她于1327年5月10日与Sir Richard Cogan在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年6月26日享年46岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary de Montagu was born in 1313, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth De Montfort, was 41. She married Sir Richard Cogan on 10 May 1327, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 26 June 1359, at the age of 46, and was buried in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary de Montagu est née en 1313, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Montfort, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Cogan le 10 mai 1327, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1359, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

Sie hat am 10. Mai 1327 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Cogan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. ko.St Frideswide, Christ Church Cathedral,: 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드 크리스트 처르치 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary de Montagu(이)가 1313년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Montfort(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1327년 5월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Sir Richard Cogan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 6월 26일 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Cogan em 10 de maio de 1327, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.St Frideswide, Christ Church Cathedral,: краист чурч кэтедраль, оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary de Montagu родилась в 1313 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Montfort, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Cogan 10 мая 1327 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 июня 1359 г. в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия.
